mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, create_user_id, mobile, head_img, `name`, age, sex, birthday, tag, member_num, hospital_id, hospital_name, depart_id, depart_code, depart_name, office_holder_code, office_holder_name,achievement,be_good_at_text, introduction_text, `status`, is_auth, token, ca_number, email, person_type_code, person_type_name, position_code, position_name, papers_code, papers_name, papers_numbers, user_sig, is_cancel,`index`,doctor_type
mapper.select: SELECT tdu.* FROM t_doctor_user tdu LEFT JOIN t_mdt_team_doctor tmtd ON tmtd.doctor_user_id = tdu.id LEFT JOIN t_mdt_team tmt ON tmt.id = tmtd.mdt_team_id LEFT JOIN t_mdt_order tmo ON tmo.mdt_team_id = tmt.id WHERE tmtd.is_main = #{isMain} AND tmo.order_num = #{mdtOrderNum}

SELECT, CASE is_auth WHEN 'NONE' THEN 0 WHEN 'WAIT' THEN 1 WHEN 'REJECT' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END AS order_by_is_auth FROM t_doctor_user WHERE is_cancel = 0
and member_num LIKE CONCAT('%',#{map.memberNum},'%')
and `name` LIKE CONCAT('%',#{map.name},'%')
and hospital_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{map.hospitalName},'%')
and depart_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{map.departName},'%')
and mobile = #{map.mobile}
ORDER BY order_by_is_auth , create_time DESC , ISNULL(`index`),`index`,id ASC
